mods.name: High-Flow Air Filter
mods.description: A drop-in performance filter for the factory airbox improves airflow to the twin-turbo 13B-REW rotary engine with zero fitment risk.
mods.installNotes: Open stock airbox lid, remove factory paper filter, drop in replacement. No tools needed. Clean and re-oil every 20,000 miles.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: Unleash the 13B rotary scream with a performance catback. The rotary exhaust note is unlike any piston engine — unique and addictive.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the mid-pipe back. Single exit or dual exit options. Hangs on factory mounts. 1 hour on jack stands. The rotary sounds incredible uncorked.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: The factory side-mount intercooler is small and heat soaks rapidly. A front-mount intercooler provides dramatically improved charge air cooling.
mods.installNotes: V-mount setup positions the intercooler and radiator in a V shape for optimal airflow. Requires removal of front bumper. Custom piping to turbo. 4+ hours. Significant power improvement.

mods.name: Boost Controller
mods.description: Control boost pressure on the sequential twin-turbo system for safe and reliable power increases above the factory 10 psi limit.
mods.partNumbers: HKS EVC 7, GReddy Profec B Spec II
mods.installNotes: Install inline with the wastegate vacuum line. The sequential turbo system complicates boost control — electronic boost controllers handle the transition point between turbos better. Start at 12 psi.

mods.name: Standalone ECU
mods.description: The factory ECU is extremely limited for tuning. A standalone unit is essential for any serious power build on the 13B-REW.
mods.installNotes: Plug-and-play harness adapters available for the FD. Configure rotary-specific ignition settings (leading and trailing plugs). Sequential turbo control via solenoid outputs. Professional tune mandatory. 8+ hours.

mods.name: Single Turbo Conversion
mods.description: Replace the complex sequential twin-turbo system with a single large turbo for simplified plumbing, better reliability, and higher power potential.
mods.partNumbers: Greddy T78 Single Turbo Kit, BorgWarner EFR 7670
mods.installNotes: Remove twin turbos and sequential valve system. Install single turbo with custom manifold. Requires fuel system upgrades, standalone ECU, and custom piping. Simplifies the engine bay significantly. 15+ hours.

mods.name: Rebuilt 13B-REW Engine
mods.description: The 13B rotary requires engine rebuilds more frequently than piston engines. A properly rebuilt 13B with upgraded apex seals is essential for longevity.
mods.partNumbers: Goopy Performance Apex Seals, Atkins Rotary rebuild kit
mods.installNotes: Full engine-out teardown. Replace apex seals, corner seals, and side seals. Inspect and lap housings. New bearings and gaskets throughout. Use premix oil in fuel (1 oz per gallon) after rebuild. 30+ hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers bring the FD RX-7's lightweight chassis alive with precise ride height and damping control. The FD weighs only 2,800 lbs.
mods.partNumbers: Ohlins Road & Track MI30, KW V3 35255005
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. The FD is light, so moderate spring rates work well. Set ride height 15–20mm below stock. The front-rear weight distribution is nearly 50/50. Alignment mandatory.
